briefing: Happy Friday, March 20th! KOSPI continues to show volatility amid Middle East tensions, closing at 5763.22 yesterday after a 2.73% dip. Semiconductor optimism remains a potential rebound factor. In the art scene, 'Spectrosynthesis Seoul' opens today at Art Sonje Center—the largest queer art exhibition in Korea. '20!2026 Art Seoul' is also ongoing until April 13, featuring a unique 80% refund guarantee.
